name: Maple Syrup Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the nuts in a saucepan.
2. Stir over heat until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Boil gently, without stirring, to 238 degrees (F) or to the soft ball stage.
4. Cool to lukewarm; beat until the color changes and the candy begins to set.
5. Stir in the broken nuts.
6. Turn into a buttered pan.
7. Mark in squares when firm.
